paper_title: Pore-water and Sediment Sampling and Analysis

methods.description: Process for obtaining pore-water and solid-phase samples from whole-round core samples onboard D/V Chikyu, ensuring minimal oxygen exposure to preserve redox-sensitive parameters.

steps.description: Pore-water and solid-phase samples were obtained from whole-round core (WRC) samples onboard D/V Chikyu.
steps.searchable_summary: obtain pore-water and solid-phase samples from WRC samples

steps.description: Pore water was extracted by squeezing WRC samples in titanium squeezers, avoiding oxygen contact.
steps.searchable_summary: extract pore water using titanium squeezers

steps.description: Pore-water aliquots were acidified with concentrated ultrapure HCl and stored in pre-cleaned vials at +4°C.
Solid-phase samples were transferred into gas-tight aluminum bags, flushed with nitrogen, vacuum-sealed, and stored at −20°C.
steps.searchable_summary: store solid-phase samples in nitrogen-flushed bags

methods.description: Analytical procedures for determining pore-water constituents, including dissolved Fe using the ferrozine method.

steps.description: Dissolved Fe (Fe(II) aq) was determined using the ferrozine method.
steps.searchable_summary: determine dissolved Fe using ferrozine method

methods.description: Procedure for measuring Fe isotopes using MC-ICP-MS, including sample preparation and instrumental calibration.

steps.description: Pore-water samples were processed by evaporation and re-dissolution in 5M HCl + 0.001% v/v suprapur® H2O2.
steps.searchable_summary: process samples by evaporation and re-dissolution

steps.description: Fe was purified from sample matrices by column chromatography using AG-MP1 anion exchange resin.
Fe isotope measurement was performed using MC-ICP-MS with sample-standard-bracketing approach.

methods.description: Analytical procedures for solid-phase samples, including total acid digestions and sequential extraction of reactive Fe pools.

steps.description: Total acid digestions were performed using a CEM Mars Xpress microwave system.
steps.searchable_summary: perform total acid digestions using microwave system

steps.description: Bulk element contents were determined by ICP-OES analysis.
steps.searchable_summary: determine bulk element contents using ICP-OES

steps.description: Sequential extractions were performed following established protocols.
